title: Model Optimizations for Aesthetic Score Prediction
short_description: Benchmark and optimize a two-stage image aesthetic scoring pipeline (CLIP ViT-L/14 + Global/Personalized MLP) on NVIDIA GPU and CPU using PyTorch, ONNX, quantization, hardware-specific execution providers, FastAPI serving, and NVIDIA Triton Inference Server. Uses the Flickr-AES dataset.
